text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the autumn Tenno Sho. We're
slated to race against T.M. Opera O once again,
but Meisho Doto has another objective at heart...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O finally acknowledged my skills at
the Takarazuka Kinen. So this time...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'd like today to be the day she considers me her
partner. I, too, will shine bright just like her.
I cheerfully see Meisho Doto off. After that...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So, any luck finding a way to break past the
ceiling?
choice_data_list: Not yet, but we're gonna see the answer today.
Not yet, but we're gonna see the answer today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hah! That's a tight deadline you're setting. But, if
you happen to figure it out...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I won't pretend to understand complex stats,
but...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If there is a ceiling hampering Doto's
growth—casting a shadow over her
potential—then I know the cause.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I think we've both known deep down, this whole
time. Right, Trainer?

I gulp down some air, having been called out.
Something might become unveiled during this fall
season race.
